BARD_CARD_BARD_ATTACK.title: Shrill Scream
BARD_CARD_BARD_BLOCK.title: Harmony Shield
BARD_CARD_VICIOUS_MOCKERY.title: Vicious Mockery
BARD_CARD_BLADE_WARD.title: Blade Ward
BARD_CARD_BLADE_WARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
This turn, [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies deal 50% less damage to you.
BARD_CARD_BANE.title: Bane
BARD_CARD_COURAGE_SONG.title: Song of Courage
BARD_CARD_BRISK_BEAT.title: Brisk Beat
BARD_CARD_BRISK_BEAT.description:
Draw 1 card.
ALL allies gain {Duration:diff()} Brisk Beat: draw 1 card at start of turn.
BARD_CARD_CRIPPLING_THRUST.title: Crippling Thrust
BARD_CARD_DISENGAGE.title: Disengage
BARD_CARD_DISENGAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If the last card played was an [gold]Attack[/gold], draw 2 cards.
If the last card played was a [gold]Skill[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
BARD_CARD_EMERGENCY.title: Emergency
BARD_CARD_EMERGENCY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next [gold]Magic[/gold] or [gold]Song[/gold] card costs 1 less.
BARD_CARD_MADE_HAND.title: Mage Hand
BARD_CARD_MADE_HAND.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Retain[/gold] {retainAmount:diff()} cards in your hand.
BARD_CARD_TRUE_STRIKE.title: True Strike
BARD_CARD_TRUE_STRIKE.description:
Remove all [gold]Artifact[/gold] from the enemy.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
BARD_CARD_THUNDER_CLAP.title: Thunder Clap
BARD_CARD_INVISBILITY.title: Invisibility
BARD_CARD_CURE_WOUNDS.title: Cure Wounds
BARD_CARD_HASTE.title: Haste
BARD_CARD_HASTE.description: Lasts 2 turns. Each turn gain +2 [gold]Energy[/gold] and +2 [gold]Draw[/gold]. After 2 turns, gain 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and 2 [gold]Weak[/gold].
BARD_CARD_LONG_STRIDER.title: Longstrider
BARD_CARD_LONG_STRIDER.description: Grant a target {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
BARD_CARD_FAERIE_FIRE.title: Faerie Fire
BARD_CARD_HEROISM.title: Heroism
BARD_CARD_SWORD_DANCE.title: Sword Dance
BARD_CARD_SWORD_DANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card was an [gold]Attack[/gold], attack twice instead.
If the last card was a [gold]Skill[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} Block.
BARD_CARD_RHYTHM_STRIKE.title: Rhythm Strike
BARD_CARD_RHYTHM_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Harmony[/gold] is above 3, gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)} [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
BARD_CARD_ALL_NIGHT_COMPOSITION.title: All-Night Composition
BARD_CARD_ALL_NIGHT_COMPOSITION.descript: Gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)} [gold]Energy[/gold]. Add 1 [red]Dazed[/red] to your draw pile.
BARD_CARD_DEADLY_PERFORMANCE.title: Deadly Performance
BARD_CARD_DEADLY_PERFORMANCE.description: Whenever you cast a [gold]Magic[/gold] card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
BARD_CARD_MELODIC_WARD.title: Melodic Ward
BARD_CARD_MELODIC_WARD.description: Whenever you cast a [gold]Magic[/gold] card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
BARD_CARD_ALLEGRO.title: Allegro
BARD_CARD_ALLEGRO.description: ALL allies gain {duration:diff()} Allegro: gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] at start of turn.
BARD_CARD_HEARSAY.title: Hearsay
BARD_CARD_HEARSAY.description: Obtain a random [gold]Song[/gold] or [gold]Magic[/gold] card. It costs 0 this turn.
BARD_CARD_DANCING_YOUTH.title: Dancing Youth
BARD_CARD_DANCING_YOUTH.description: At turn start, if you played 2+ card types last turn, draw 1 card.
BARD_CARD_IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
BARD_CARD_IMPROVISE.description: At turn start, gain a random [gold]Song[/gold] card. It gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
BARD_CARD_CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
BARD_CARD_CURTAIN_CALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal damage once for each card type played this combat.{InCombat:
({CalculatedHits:diff()} hits)|}
BARD_CARD_VALIANT_STRIKE.title: Valiant Strike
BARD_CARD_VALIANT_DASH.title: Valiant Dash
BARD_CARD_VALIANT_DASH.description: Consume all [gold]Vigor[/gold]. Draw 1 card per 3 Vigor consumed.
BARD_CARD_BUILD_UP_MOMENTUM.title: Build Up Momentum
BARD_CARD_WAR_SONG.title: War Song
BARD_CARD_WAR_SONG.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Song[/gold] card, gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
BARD_CARD_EYEBITE.title: Eyebite
BARD_CARD_OVERCLOCK_CASTING.title: Overclock Casting
BARD_CARD_CALM_EMOTIONS.title: Calm Emotions
BARD_CARD_CALM_EMOTIONS.description: Remove all [gold]negative effects[/gold] from a target.
BARD_CARD_MANA_SURGE.title: Mana Surge
BARD_CARD_MANA_SURGE.description: The first time you cast a [gold]Magic[/gold] card each turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
BARD_CARD_MAGIC_WEAPON.title: Magic Weapon
BARD_CARD_THUNDERCLAP_BLADE.title: Thunderclap Blade
BARD_CARD_THUNDERCLAP_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever the enemy receives a debuff this turn, they take {ThunderclapPower} damage.
BARD_CARD_MIRROR_IMAGE.title: Mirror Image
BARD_CARD_MIRROR_IMAGE.description:
Gain {mirror:diff()} [gold]Mirror[/gold].
When attacked, reduce damage by {reductionPerLayer:diff()} per stack, then lose 1 stack.
BARD_CARD_BOOST_MORALE.title: Boost Morale
BARD_CARD_BOOST_MORALE.description:
ALL allies gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Consume all [gold]Vigor[/gold], gain 1 Block per Vigor spent.
BARD_CARD_GUARDIAN_RUNE.title: Guardian Rune
BARD_CARD_GUARDIAN_RUNE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you lose [gold]Block[/gold], deal equal damage to ALL enemies.
BARD_CARD_MASS_POLYMORPH.title: Mass Polymorph
BARD_CARD_MASS_POLYMORPH.description: Choose any number of cards in hand. Transform them into random [gold]Magic[/gold] cards. {IfUpgraded:show:Upgrade the transformed cards.|}
BARD_CARD_EAR_PIERCING_SHRIEK.title: Ear-Piercing Shriek
BARD_CARD_EAR_PIERCING_SHRIEK.descriptio: ALL enemies lose {strReduction} Strength and {dexReduction} Dexterity this turn.
BARD_CARD_RHAPSODY.title: Rhapsody
BARD_CARD_RHAPSODY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Each [gold]Magic[/gold] card drawn refunds {Energy:energyIcons(1)}.
BARD_CARD_INSPIRATION_RESONANCE.title: Inspiration Resonance
BARD_CARD_INSPIRATION_RESONANCE.descript: [red]Ethereal[/red]. Exhaust. This turn, each [gold]Song[/gold] card played refunds {Energy:energyIcons(1)}. {IfUpgraded:show:Lose Ethereal.|}
BARD_CARD_SEE_YOU_AGAIN.title: See You Again
BARD_CARD_SEE_YOU_AGAIN.description: Recover {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], then discard 1 card.
BARD_CARD_SEE_YOU_AGAIN.selectionScreenP: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to return to your hand.
BARD_CARD_NEVER_GONNA_GIVE_YOU_UP.title: Never Gonna Give You Up
BARD_CARD_NEVER_GONNA_GIVE_YOU_UP.select: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to return to your hand.
BARD_CARD_FLIGHT_OF_THE_BUMBLEBEE.title: Flight of the Bumblebee
BARD_CARD_FLIGHT_OF_THE_BUMBLEBEE.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
BARD_CARD_RAGING_FLURRY.title: Raging Flurry
BARD_CARD_EXPLOSIVE_POWER.title: Explosive Power
BARD_CARD_EXPLOSIVE_POWER.description:
Consume {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Draw 1 [gold]Attack[/gold], 1 [gold]Skill[/gold], and 1 [gold]Power[/gold] from your draw pile.
BARD_CARD_EXPLOSIVE_POWER.selectionScree: Choose cards to add to your hand.
BARD_CARD_PEERLESS_DANCE.title: Peerless Dance
BARD_CARD_PEERLESS_DANCE.description: Choose an [gold]Attack[/gold] card in hand. It gains Recur 1.
BARD_CARD_PEERLESS_DANCE.selectionScreen: Choose an Attack card to gain Recur.
BARD_CARD_HONEYED_TONGUE.title: Honeyed Tongue
BARD_CARD_HONEYED_TONGUE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies. If the last card was a [gold]Skill[/gold], apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] instead.
BARD_CARD_ENCORE.title: Encore
BARD_CARD_ENCORE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal damage once for each [gold]Song[/gold] played this combat.{InCombat:
({CalculatedHits:diff()} Songs)|}
BARD_CARD_STREET_PERFORMANCE.title: Street Performance
BARD_CARD_STREET_PERFORMANCE.description: If you played a [gold]Song[/gold] this turn, gain {Gold:diff()} Gold.
BARD_CARD_ECHOING_MELODY.title: Echoing Melody
BARD_CARD_ECHOING_MELODY.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to yourself. At turn start, play an Exhausting copy of the last [gold]Song[/gold] played last turn.
BARD_CARD_FIRE_BALL.title: Fireball
BARD_CARD_MAGICAL_ARMOR.title: Magical Armor
BARD_CARD_NEVER_GIVE_UP.title: Never Give Up
BARD_CARD_NEVER_GIVE_UP.description:
Whenever you would die, heal {healAmount:diff()} HP instead.
Costs 1 less for each [gold]Song[/gold] played this turn.
BARD_CARD_PHANTASMAL_KILLER.title: Phantasmal Killer
BARD_CARD_PHANTASMAL_KILLER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.  After playing, return to your hand at the start of next turn.
BARD_CARD_RHYTHM_STORM.title: Rhythm Storm
BARD_CARD_RHYTHM_STORM.description: When you play a [gold]Song[/gold] or cast a [gold]Magic[/gold] card, gain 2 [gold]Vigor[/gold]. When you gain Vigor, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
BARD_CARD_BANSHEE_WAIL.title: Banshee Wail
BARD_CARD_BANSHEE_WAIL.description: [gold]Chant[/gold]. Next turn, ALL enemies gain {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. Exhaust.
BARD_CARD_WEAKNESS_SHRIEK.title: Weakness Shriek
BARD_CARD_WEAKNESS_SHRIEK.description: ALL enemies lose {strReduction:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {dexReduction:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn. Exhaust.
BARD_CARD_INSPIRING_MELODY.title: Inspiring Melody
BARD_CARD_INSPIRING_MELODY.description: [gold]Chant[/gold]. Next turn, ALL allies gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
BARD_CARD_DARK_CACOPHONY.title: Dark Cacophony
BARD_CARD_DARK_CACOPHONY.description: Power. At turn start, ALL enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP.
BARD_CARD_CLEAR_CHANT.title: Clear Chant
BARD_CARD_CLEAR_CHANT.description: [gold]Chant[/gold]. Next turn, search your draw pile for {Cards:diff()} [gold]Magic[/gold] cards and add them to your hand.
BARD_CARD_SERENE_SONG.title: Serene Song
BARD_CARD_SERENE_SONG.description: [gold]Chant[/gold]. Next turn, ALL allies heal {Heal} HP.
BARD_CARD_ARCANE_ECHO.title: Arcane Echo
BARD_CARD_ARCANE_ECHO.description: Power. Whenever [gold]Harmony[/gold] reaches {threshold:diff()} stacks, recover a random [gold]Magic[/gold] card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
BARD_CARD_THUNDERWAVE.title: Thunderwave
BARD_CARD_THUNDERWAVE.description: Deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat} times. Reduce their Strength by {strengthLoss}.
BARD_CARD_DISSONANT_WHISPERS.title: Dissonant Whispers
BARD_CARD_BOTTOMS_UP.title: Bottom’s Up
BARD_CARD_BOTTOMS_UP.description:
Gain {StrengthPower} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Gain {VigorPower} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Add {dizzyCount} [red]Dazed[/red] to your discard pile.
BARD_CARD_FOLLOW_UP_STRIKE.title: Follow-Up Strike
BARD_CARD_FOLLOW_UP_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage} damage. If you played a Song this turn, gain 1 Energy and deal damage again.
BARD_CARD_BESTOW_CURSE.title: Bestow Curse
BARD_CARD_BESTOW_CURSE.description: Deal {Damage} damage. Apply {WeakPower} Weak. Reduce enemy Strength by {strengthLoss}.
BARD_CARD_PRISMATIC_SPRAY.title: Prismatic Spray
BARD_CARD_PRISMATIC_SPRAY.description: Deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy. Repeat {Repeat} times.
BARD_CARD_ENHANCE_ABILITY.title: Enhance Ability
BARD_CARD_ENHANCE_ABILITY.description: Gain {StrengthPower} Strength. Gain {DexterityPower} Dexterity. Draw {Cards} cards.
BARD_CARD_BULL_STRENGTH.title: Bull’s Strength
BARD_CARD_CAT_GRACE.title: Cat’s Grace
BARD_CARD_FOX_CUNNING.title: Fox’s Cunning
BARD_CARD_FOX_CUNNING.description: Draw {Cards} cards. The next Magic card you play this turn costs 1 less Energy.
BARD_CARD_ENLARGE.title: Enlarge
BARD_CARD_ENLARGE.description:
Grant an ally [gold]Gigantification[/gold].
Their next [gold]Powered Attack[/gold] deals 3x damage.
BARD_CARD_REDUCE.title: Reduce
BARD_CARD_REDUCE.description: Apply Shrink to an enemy for {duration} turns (reduces powered attack damage by 30%).
BARD_CARD_VALIANT_PRESENCE.title: Valiant Presence
BARD_CARD_VALIANT_PRESENCE.description: Whenever you lose Vigor, gain Block equal to the stacks lost.
BARD_CARD_POLYMORPH.title: Polymorph
BARD_CARD_POLYMORPH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Transform up to {transformCount:diff()} cards in hand into random [gold]Bard[/gold] cards. They cost 0 this turn.
BARD_CARD_FLURRY_THRUST.title: Flurry Thrust
BARD_CARD_WEAKPOINT_STRIKE.title: Weakpoint Strike
BARD_CARD_PARRY_RIPOSTE.title: Parry & Riposte
BARD_CARD_PARRY_RIPOSTE.description: Gain {Block} Block. Deal {Damage} damage back to the attacker.
BARD_CARD_SLIDE_STEP.title: Slide Step
